---
title: "blog"
listing:
  contents: "../posts/**/index.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: false
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [date, title, reading-time, description, image]
  image-align: right
---

:::{.page-intro}
Tat ca bai viet da publish, sap xep theo thoi gian moi nhat truoc.
:::
